---
# title: "Kenneth Breugelmans"
# subtitle: "Data Scientist | Builder at Heart | Applying ML, Engineering & Operational Experience to Transform Terminal Operations"
listing:
  contents: research
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, date, title, reading-time, description]
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
toc: false
number-sections: false
---

::: {.hero-header}
![](img/profile.jpg){.profile_pic}

::: {.hero-text}
# Kenneth Breugelmans {.hero-title}

### Data Scientist | Builder at Heart | Applying ML, Engineering & Operational Experience to Transform Terminal Operations {.hero-subtitle}
:::
:::


&nbsp;

&nbsp;

## About

I've spent years on the floor of one of Europe's busiest container terminals — operating quay cranes, driving straddle carriers, managing live cargo flows. I became a data scientist because I saw what better information could do for operations that still run largely on instinct and experience.

Today I work at the intersection of heavy industry and modern data engineering: building integration layers for legacy terminal operating systems, designing digital twins that make real-time operations legible, and implementing reinforcement learning models for container optimization.

I don't do mystery. You'll know what I'm building, why, and where it stands. I ask uncomfortable questions early so they don't become expensive problems later. If you need someone who understands your operations before touching your data, we'll get along well.

&nbsp;

&nbsp;

## Expertise

**Domain Knowledge:** Over a decade of hands-on experience across the full operational hierarchy of a large container terminal — from dockworker to straddle carrier driver to quay crane operator. I understand the workflows, constraints, and failure modes that don't appear in any manual.

**Data Science & ML:** Machine learning, predictive modeling, and reinforcement learning applied to real operational problems — not benchmarks.

**Systems & Engineering:** Integration architecture connecting legacy TOS infrastructure with modern applications. Full-stack development, CAD design, and a builder's instinct for making things work end to end.

&nbsp;

&nbsp;

## Toolbox

**Programming Languages:**

 Python ![](/img/icons/python.png){.icon} [|]{.sep}  Mojo ![](/img/icons/mojo.svg){.icon} [|]{.sep}  SQL ![](/img/icons/sql.svg){.icon} [|]{.sep}  JS ![](/img/icons/javascript.png){.icon} [|]{.sep}  C# ![](/img/icons/csharp.svg){.icon} [|]{.sep}  Java ![](/img/icons/java.png){.icon} [|]{.sep}  Kotlin ![](/img/icons/kotlin.jpg){.icon} [|]{.sep}  GCODE ![](/img/icons/gcode.png){.icon}

---

**Data Processing & Pipelines:**

 Pandas ![](/img/icons/pandas.png){.icon} [|]{.sep}  Polars ![](/img/icons/polars.svg){.icon} [|]{.sep}  DuckDB ![](/img/icons/duckdb.svg){.icon} [|]{.sep}  Dask ![](/img/icons/dask.svg){.icon} [|]{.sep}  Numpy ![](/img/icons/numpy.svg){.icon} [|]{.sep}  Scikit-Learn ![](/img/icons/sklearn.png){.icon} [|]{.sep}  OpenCV ![](/img/icons/opencv.svg){.icon}

---

**Data Visualisation:**

 Matplotlib ![](/img/icons/matplotlib.svg){.icon} [|]{.sep}  Plotly ![](/img/icons/plotly.svg){.icon} [|]{.sep}  Seaborn ![](/img/icons/seaborn.png){.icon} [|]{.sep}  Folium ![](/img/icons/folium.svg){.icon} [|]{.sep}  Tableau ![](/img/icons/tableau.png){.icon} [|]{.sep}  PowerBi ![](/img/icons/Power_BI_Logo.png){.icon}

---

**ML modelling:**

 XGBoost ![](/img/icons/xgboost.jpg){.icon} [|]{.sep}  YDF ![](/img/icons/YDF.png){.icon} [|]{.sep}  LightGBM ![](/img/icons/LightGBM.png){.icon} [|]{.sep}  CatBoost ![](/img/icons/CatBoostLogo.png){.icon} [|]{.sep}  FastAi ![](/img/icons/fastai.png){.icon} [|]{.sep}  PyTorch ![](/img/icons/pytorch.png){.icon} [|]{.sep}  Lightning AI ![](/img/icons/lightning.png){.icon} [|]{.sep} Optuna ![](/img/icons/optuna.png){.icon} [|]{.sep} SHAP ![](/img/icons/shap.png){.icon} 

---

**Web & Publication:**

 Flask ![](/img/icons/flask.svg){.icon} [|]{.sep}  Streamlit ![](/img/icons/streamlit.svg){.icon} [|]{.sep}  Deck GL ![](/img/icons/deckgl.png){.icon} [|]{.sep}  HTML ![](/img/icons/html.png){.icon} [|]{.sep}  Bootstrap ![](/img/icons/bootstrap.svg){.icon} [|]{.sep}  Vue ![](/img/icons/vue-svgrepo-com.svg){.icon} [|]{.sep}  Quarto ![](/img/icons/quarto.svg){.icon} 

---

**Cloud:**

 Microsoft Azure ![](/img/icons/Microsoft_Azure.svg.png){.icon} [|]{.sep} Google Cloud ![](/img/icons/google.png){.icon} [|]{.sep}  Amazon aws ![](/img/icons/aws.png){.icon}

---

**Engineering & Simulation:**

Unity ![](/img/icons/unity.svg){.icon} [|]{.sep} Autodesk Fusion 360 ![](/img/icons/autodesk-fusion-360-icon.svg){.icon} [|]{.sep} Autodesk Inventor ![](/img/icons/autodesk-inventor-icon.svg){.icon} [|]{.sep} Onshape ![](/img/icons/onshape-svgrepo-com.svg){.icon} [|]{.sep} SketchUp! ![](/img/icons/sketchup-icon.svg){.icon} 

&nbsp;

&nbsp;

## Career Timeline

```{=html}
<div class="tl-wrap">

<div class="tl-item">
  <div class="tl-left"><span class="tl-year">present<br>Jul 2024</span></div>
  <div class="tl-spine"><div class="tl-dot current"></div><div class="tl-line"></div></div>
  <div class="tl-right">
    <div class="tl-card current">
      <span class="tl-badge badge-work">Current role</span>
      <p class="tl-title">Data Scientist</p>
      <p class="tl-org">MSC PSA European Terminal (MPET) · Antwerp</p>
      <p class="tl-desc">Building ML pipelines, RL models for container optimisation, systems integration for legacy TOS infrastructure, and a real-time digital twin for operational decision-making.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="tl-item">
  <div class="tl-left"><span class="tl-year">Sep 2024<br>May 2023</span></div>
  <div class="tl-spine"><div class="tl-dot edu"></div><div class="tl-line"></div></div>
  <div class="tl-right">
    <div class="tl-card edu-card">
      <span class="tl-badge badge-edu">Education</span>
      <p class="tl-title">Data Science</p>
      <p class="tl-org">Turing College · Online</p>
      <p class="tl-desc">Intensive professional programme covering machine learning, data engineering, and applied statistics — completed while working full-time as a crane operator.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="tl-item">
  <div class="tl-left"><span class="tl-year">Jul 2024<br>Aug 2019</span></div>
  <div class="tl-spine"><div class="tl-dot work"></div><div class="tl-line"></div></div>
  <div class="tl-right">
    <div class="tl-card">
      <p class="tl-title">Ship-to-Shore Crane Operator</p>
      <p class="tl-org">MSC PSA European Terminal (MPET) · Antwerp</p>
      <p class="tl-desc">Operating single and dual hoist cranes on some of the world's largest container vessels. Collaborated with technical teams on complex software and hardware troubleshooting.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="tl-item">
  <div class="tl-left"><span class="tl-year">Aug 2019<br>Aug 2017</span></div>
  <div class="tl-spine"><div class="tl-dot work"></div><div class="tl-line"></div></div>
  <div class="tl-right">
    <div class="tl-card">
      <p class="tl-title">Straddle Carrier Operator</p>
      <p class="tl-org">MSC PSA European Terminal (MPET) · Antwerp</p>
      <p class="tl-desc">Container transport and yard logistics across complex terminal layouts. Responsible for equipment reliability checks and coordination with maintenance teams.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="tl-item">
  <div class="tl-left"><span class="tl-year">Jul 2024<br>Sep 2015</span></div>
  <div class="tl-spine"><div class="tl-dot work"></div><div class="tl-line"></div></div>
  <div class="tl-right">
    <div class="tl-card">
      <p class="tl-title">Dock Worker</p>
      <p class="tl-org">CEPA · Antwerp</p>
      <p class="tl-desc">Container preparation, discharge coordination, and crane guidance under limited visibility conditions. Specialised in twistlock troubleshooting and live operational problem-solving.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="tl-item">
  <div class="tl-left"><span class="tl-year">Sep 2015<br>Mar 2013</span></div>
  <div class="tl-spine"><div class="tl-dot work"></div><div class="tl-line"></div></div>
  <div class="tl-right">
    <div class="tl-card">
      <p class="tl-title">Production Operator</p>
      <p class="tl-org">Xtraflex · Lier</p>
      <p class="tl-desc">Custom Teflon hose fabrication to tight tolerances. Managed the Trax racing store, building bespoke brake lines for classic cars, rally cars, and racing motorcycles.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="tl-item">
  <div class="tl-left"><span class="tl-year">Aug-Sep 2011<br>Jul-Aug 2010</span></div>
  <div class="tl-spine"><div class="tl-dot work"></div><div class="tl-line"></div></div>
  <div class="tl-right">
    <div class="tl-card">
      <p class="tl-title">Operator (summer job while studying)</p>
      <p class="tl-org">Atlas Copco Airpower · Antwerp</p>
      <p class="tl-desc">Installation of custom electrical modules into industrial compressors according to client specifications.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```

## Featured Portfolio
